title: The Dark Side of Mumbai: 4 Bhootiya Jagah Jo Aap... | RAAZ FILES
description:
mumbai ki bhutiya jagah - Mumbai ke sabse darawne aur haunted jagahon ke peeche ka sach kya hai? Aaj ke RAAZ FILES ke episode me hum explore karenge D'Souza Chawl, Sanjay Gandhi National Park, Taj Mahal Palace Hotel aur Mukesh Mills ke un raazon ko jise sunkar aapke ronge khade ho jayenge. Kya ye bhoot-pret hain ya dunya ka sabse bada scientific illusion? Video ko end tak dekhein aur apna opinion comments me batayein!

Is video mein: Mumbai ke Bhootiya Jagah se judi unsolved mystery, real story aur mind-blowing facts -- poori kahani Hinglish mein, RAAZ FILES par.

Chapters:
00:00 Kya Aapko Pata Hai
01:45 Kai Drivers Aur Forest
03:33 Aapko Laga Ki Mukesh

Aise aur raaz, rahasya aur sacchi kahaniyon ke liye channel ko SUBSCRIBE karo aur bell icon dabao.

Kya aapko lagta hai ki Mukesh Mills me sach me bhoot hai ya sirf science ka khel? Mujhe comments me batao, aur hamari agli video dekhne ke liye ready ho jao jahan hum Shimla ke ek aisi railway tunnel ka sach samne layenge jahan train achanak gayab ho jati hai. Subscribe to RAAZ FILES aur bell icon daba dena!
Naye raaz roz -- Subscribe karo. RAAZ KHULEGA.

Ye video entertainment aur educational purpose ke liye hai; kuch theories unverified hain / kaha jata hai.
